name: fluel-frontend
description: Public frontend for fluel — marketing site and Telegram Mini App

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix site install && npm --prefix webapp install && npm --prefix brand install
scripts.build: npm run build:site && npm run build:webapp
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix site run typecheck && npm --prefix webapp run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm --prefix site run lint && npm --prefix webapp run lint
scripts.test: npm --prefix site test && npm --prefix webapp test
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
